title: JWST Lensed Quasar Dark Matter Survey V: Measuring the minimum halo mass with strong gravitational lensing
summary: We explore the lowest mass limit that can be placed on the halo mass function in CDM using 28 strong gravitational lenses. For this purpose, we study an extreme model in which the halo mass function and mass-concentration relation follow CDM, with a sharp cutoff at some mass scale, $m_{\rm{low}}$. Lensing provides a unique window into this quantity as it does not depend on the presence of baryons in dark matter halos and also allows the detection of low mass halos at cosmological distances, both in the lens galaxies and along the line-of-sight. Our model incorporates the effects of tidal stripping of subhalos, leading to the presence of many subhalos below a given model cutoff scale. We place an upper limit on the low-mass cutoff of the halo mass function of $m_{\rm{low}}<10^{8.3}$ M$_\odot$ at 10:1 odds using a prior for the normalization of the subhalo mass function from the semi-analytic model {\tt galacticus} and $m_{\rm{low}}<10^{8.2}$ M$_\odot$ at 10:1 odds using a prior from $N$-body simulations. These limits are comparable to, or stronger than, existing constraints based on Milky Way satellite galaxies. Based on these results, we forecast more than an order of magnitude improvement with a sample of 200 quadruply imaged quasar lenses. This number represents a small subset of the thousands that are anticipated to be discovered by Rubin, Euclid, and Roman. Furthermore, with this larger sample of lenses we expect to directly constrain the normalization of the subhalo mass function, thereby eliminating a major source of uncertainty in our current measurements.

AI.tldr: 利用28个强引力透镜研究冷暗物质模型中晕质量函数的最低质量限制，通过极端模型（带锐截止质量尺度）分析，获得晕质量函数低质量截止的上限约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用28个强引力透镜系统，探索了CDM中晕质量函数所能达到的最低质量极限。为此，我们研究了一个极端模型，其中晕质量函数和质量-浓度关系遵循CDM，并在某个质量尺度$m_{\rm{low}}$处存在尖锐截断。引力透镜为这一量提供了独特的窗口，因为它不依赖于暗物质晕中重子的存在，并且还能在宇宙学距离上探测低质量晕，无论是在透镜星系中还是沿视线方向。我们的模型考虑了子晕的潮汐剥离效应，导致在给定模型截断尺度以下存在许多子晕。我们使用半解析模型{\tt galacticus}给出的子晕质量函数归一化先验，在10:1的赔率下，将晕质量函数的低质量截断上限设为$m_{\rm{low}}<10^{8.3}$ M$_\odot$；使用$N$体模拟给出的先验，在10:1的赔率下，上限设为$m_{\rm{low}}<10^{8.2}$ M$_\odot$。这些限制与基于银河系卫星星系的现有约束相当，甚至更强。基于这些结果，我们预测使用200个四重成像类星体透镜样本，可将灵敏度提高一个数量级以上。这个数量仅占预计由Rubin、Euclid和Roman发现的上千个透镜的一小部分。此外，利用这个更大的透镜样本，我们有望直接约束子晕质量函数的归一化，从而消除当前测量中的一个主要不确定性来源。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，引力透镜方法对CDM晕质量函数的低质量截止提供了强有力的约束。预计使用200个四重成像类星体透镜样本可将灵敏度提高一个数量级以上，并且能够直接约束子晕质量函数的归一化，消除当前测量的主要不确定性来源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The joint posterior probability distribution for a cutoff in the halo mass function ( \(m_{{low}}\) ), and normalization of the projected subhalo mass function ( \(\Sigma_{{sub}}\) ), shown for three different priors on \(\Sigma_{{sub}}\) , jointly inferred from 28 lenses. One-sided \(95\%\) exclusion limits, and 10:1 Bayes factor constraints taken with respect to the peak of the marginal distribution, are summarized in the top right. Contours show \(68\%\) and \(95\%\) confidence regions.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：晕质量函数截断 ( \(m_{{low}}\) ) 与投影子晕质量函数归一化 ( \(\Sigma_{{sub}}\) ) 的联合后验概率分布，展示了从28个透镜联合推断出的三种不同 \(\Sigma_{{sub}}\) 先验。右上角总结了单侧 \(95\%\) 排除限和相对于边缘分布峰值的10:1贝叶斯因子约束。等高线表示 \(68\%\) 和 \(95\%\) 置信区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of the flux ratio distribution for a mock cusp lens for three different dark matter scenarios; a warm dark matter model with a half-mode-mass \(m_{hm}=10^{9}\) M ⊙ , a CDM-like model with a sharp cutoff at \(m_{{low}}=10^{9}\) M ⊙ and a CDM model with no detectable cutoff. All other dark matter parameters, are held fixed between the simulations. The \(m_{{low}}\) model predicts a broader spread of flux ratios than the WDM model, providing a qualitative demonstration of the relative importance of the higher concentrations of \(m_{{low}}\) subhalos in perturbing the lensed images. Vertical bars indicate the 95% confidence interval.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：三种不同暗物质情景下模拟尖点透镜的流量比分布比较：半模质量 \(m_{hm}=10^{9}\) M ⊙ 的温暗物质模型、在 \(m_{{low}}=10^{9}\) M ⊙ 处具有尖锐截断的类CDM模型，以及无可探测截断的CDM模型。所有其他暗物质参数在模拟中保持不变。\(m_{{low}}\) 模型预测的流量比分布比WDM模型更宽，这定性说明了 \(m_{{low}}\) 子晕的更高浓度在扰动透镜图像中的相对重要性。竖线表示95%置信区间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Forecast 10:1 posterior odds ratio limit on \(m_{{low}}\) as a function of the number of quadruply imaged quasars in the sample. Spread indicates the 68% confidence interval from bootstrap resampling while colors represent prior choices on \(\Sigma_{{sub}}\) . The impact of the informative priors relative to a uniform prior decreases significantly with more than 100 lenses. With about 200 lenses, we forecast a constraint of \(m_{{low}}\lesssim 10^{7}\) M \(\odot\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对 \(m_{{low}}\) 的10:1后验赔率比限制随样本中四重成像类星体数量的预测变化。散布范围表示自举重采样的68%置信区间，颜色表示 \(\Sigma_{{sub}}\) 的先验选择。与均匀先验相比，信息性先验的影响在透镜数量超过100个后显著减小。我们预测，使用约200个透镜，可获得 \(m_{{low}}\lesssim 10^{7}\) M \(\odot\) 的约束。

title: Forward analytical model for the optical selection bias on galaxy cluster lensing profiles
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication in Phys. Rev. D
summary: Cluster catalogs selected by optical properties are subject to selection biases, primarily arising from unresolved systems along the line of sight. These biases affect key observables for cluster cosmology, such as the lensing signal and clustering statistics. In this work, we present a fully predictive forward analytical model to quantify the impact of optical-selection bias due to projection effects on cluster density profiles. This is achieved by introducing a scale-dependent parametrization of the optical cluster bias, whose small- and large-scale behaviour is set by the amplitude of projection effects, and by expressing the two-halo component of the density profile in terms of the contributions from off-axis halos along the line of sight. As a case study, we consider a DES Y3-like cluster catalog and validate our model against simulated samples. Our model successfully captures the dependence of the two-halo component on richness boosts induced by projections, as well as its evolution with richness and redshift. It also recovers the overall bias in the projected density profile relative to a randomly selected sample with the same mass distribution. The framework presented here provides a consistent methodology for modeling the impact of line-of-sight structures on the observed richness and density profiles of optically selected clusters, directly linking selection biases to the underlying cosmology and survey specifications.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个完全预测性的前向分析模型，用于量化光学选择偏差对星系团密度剖面的影响，特别关注视线方向未解析系统引起的投影效应。
AI.motivation: 光学选择的星系团目录存在选择偏差，主要源于视线方向未解析的系统。这些偏差影响星系团宇宙学的关键观测量，如透镜信号和聚类统计，需要量化这些偏差对密度剖面的影响。
AI.method: 提出了一个完全预测性的前向分析模型，通过引入尺度依赖的光学星系团偏差参数化，其小尺度和大尺度行为由投影效应的幅度设定，并通过视线方向离轴晕的贡献来表达密度剖面的双晕分量。
AI.result: 模型成功捕捉了双晕分量对投影引起的丰度提升的依赖性，以及其随丰度和红移的演化。模型还恢复了相对于具有相同质量分布的随机选择样本的投影密度剖面总体偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为建模视线方向结构对光学选择星系团观测丰度和密度剖面的影响提供了一致的方法论，直接将选择偏差与基础宇宙学和巡天规格联系起来。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 通过光学性质选择的星系团星表会受到选择偏差的影响，这些偏差主要源于视线方向上的未分辨系统。这些偏差会影响星系团宇宙学的关键可观测物理量，例如引力透镜信号和成团统计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完全可预测的前瞻性解析模型，以量化由投影效应引起的光学选择偏差对星系团密度剖面的影响。这是通过引入光学星系团偏差的尺度相关参数化来实现的，其小尺度和大尺度行为由投影效应的幅度决定，并将密度剖面的双晕分量表示为视线方向离轴晕贡献的函数。作为案例研究，我们考虑了一个类似DES Y3的星系团星表，并针对模拟样本验证了我们的模型。我们的模型成功捕捉了双晕分量对投影引起的富度增强的依赖性，以及其随富度和红移的演化。它还恢复了相对于具有相同质量分布的随机选择样本的投影密度剖面的整体偏差。这里提出的框架为建模视线方向结构对光学选择星系团观测富度和密度剖面的影响提供了一致的方法论，直接将选择偏差与基础宇宙学和巡天规格联系起来。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该框架为建模视线方向结构对光学选择星系团观测富度和密度剖面的影响提供了一致的方法论，直接将选择偏差与基础宇宙学和巡天规格联系起来。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Illustration of projection effects on a target cluster with \(\lambda^{tr}\) member galaxies at redshift \(z^{ob}\) . Each i -th halo along the line of sight contributes to the cluster’s observed richness with a fraction of its own richness, which depends on the redshift separation and overlapping area: \(\rho^{prj}_{i}=\lambda_{i}w(z_{i},z^{ob})f_{A,i}\) (see equations 3 and 4 ). The same systems contribute to the observed projected density profile according to their halo properties and projected angular separation from the target cluster \(\theta_{i}\) (see equation 13 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：投影效应对红移 \(z^{ob}\) 处具有 \(\lambda^{tr}\) 个成员星系的目标星系团的影响示意图。视线方向上的每个第 i 个晕都以其自身富度的一部分贡献给星系团的观测富度，该部分取决于红移间隔和重叠面积：\(\rho^{prj}_{i}=\lambda_{i}w(z_{i},z^{ob})f_{A,i}\) （见方程3和4）。这些相同的系统根据其晕属性和与目标星系团的投影角分离 \(\theta_{i}\) 对观测到的投影密度剖面做出贡献（见方程13）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Optical cluster bias as a function of radial distance for different \(\lambda^{tr}\) values (color-coded) and fixed \(\lambda^{ob}=20\) , \(z^{ob}=0.5\) (equation 6 ). For ease of interpretation, we convert the projected angular separation to the physical distance \(R=\theta D_{A}(z^{ob})\) . Larger \(\Delta^{prj}=\lambda^{ob}-\lambda^{tr}\) values correspond to higher bias values within the projected cluster radius \(R_{\lambda}\) . For \(\Delta^{prj}\) below the background contribution ( \(\sim 2\) ), the bias becomes negative, corresponding to preferentially under-dense lines of sight selected at fixed \((\lambda^{ob},\lambda^{tr})\) . The orange line represents the mean optical bias for \(\lambda^{ob}=20\) clusters (equation 10 ) computed by weighting \(b_{\lambda^{ob}}(\lambda^{ob},\lambda^{tr},z,\theta)\) by the distribution \(P(\lambda^{tr}|\lambda^{ob}=20)\) (equation 17 ) which is displayed in the inset plot with arbitrary normalization. For comparison, the expected bias for a randomly selected sample with the same mass distribution, \(b_{eff}\) , is shown with a dot-dashed black line. Above \(b_{\lambda^{ob}}=10\) the y-axis is shown on a logarithmic scale to increase the displayed dynamical range.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于不同的 \(\lambda^{tr}\) 值（颜色编码）以及固定的 \(\lambda^{ob}=20\) 和 \(z^{ob}=0.5\) （方程6），光学星系团偏差作为径向距离的函数。为了便于解释，我们将投影角分离转换为物理距离 \(R=\theta D_{A}(z^{ob})\) 。较大的 \(\Delta^{prj}=\lambda^{ob}-\lambda^{tr}\) 值对应于投影星系团半径 \(R_{\lambda}\) 内较高的偏差值。对于低于背景贡献（约2）的 \(\Delta^{prj}\) ，偏差变为负值，对应于在固定 \((\lambda^{ob},\lambda^{tr})\) 下选择的优先欠密视线。橙色线表示通过用分布 \(P(\lambda^{tr}|\lambda^{ob}=20)\) （方程17）加权 \(b_{\lambda^{ob}}(\lambda^{ob},\lambda^{tr},z,\theta)\) 计算出的 \(\lambda^{ob}=20\) 星系团的平均光学偏差（方程10），该分布显示在插图中，具有任意归一化。作为比较，具有相同质量分布的随机选择样本的预期偏差 \(b_{eff}\) 用点划线黑线显示。在 \(b_{\lambda^{ob}}=10\) 以上，y轴以对数刻度显示以增加显示的动态范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Mean projected density profile for \(\lambda^{ob}=20\) and \(z=0.5\) ( blue line). The black line shows the contribution from the one-halo term (equation 12 ), while the red line the contribution from halos in projection (equation 13 ). The contribution of the latter becomes dominant above \(R\sim 1h^{-1}\ {Mpc}\) . The shaded bands represent the mean profiles retrieved from the mock catalog with their \(1\sigma\) uncertainty (see section III.1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：\(\lambda^{ob}=20\) 和 \(z=0.5\) 的平均投影密度剖面（蓝色线）。黑线显示单晕项（方程12）的贡献，而红线显示投影中晕的贡献（方程13）。后者的贡献在 \(R\sim 1h^{-1}\ {Mpc}\) 以上变得占主导地位。阴影带表示从模拟星表中检索到的平均剖面及其 \(1\sigma\) 不确定性（见第三节A）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Scaling relations of the mock DES Y3 cluster catalog in the redshift range \(0.2 Left panel: \(\lambda^{ob}\) and \(\lambda^{tr}\) -mass relations; the cyan and hatched orange bands represent the 68, 95 and 97.5 percentile of the \(\lambda^{tr}\) and \(\lambda^{ob}\) distributions, respectively. The stacked histograms at the bottom shows the mass distributions of the cosmological sample ( \(\lambda^{ob}>20\) ) for the different richness bins adopted in the analysis. Upper right panel: Probability distribution functions of \(\lambda^{ob}\) ( orange ) and \(\lambda^{tr}\) ( cyan ) for \(M=10^{14}h^{-1}\ M_{\odot}\) systems. Lower right panel: \(P(\lambda^{ob}|\lambda^{tr})\) distributions for \(\lambda^{tr}=20\) and \(40\) . The solid lines correspond to the model predictions derived from equation 17 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：红移范围 \(0.2<z<0.6\) 内模拟DES Y3星系团星表的标度关系。左图：\(\lambda^{ob}\) 和 \(\lambda^{tr}\) -质量关系；青色和带阴影的橙色带分别代表 \(\lambda^{tr}\) 和 \(\lambda^{ob}\) 分布的第68、95和97.5百分位数。底部的堆叠直方图显示了分析中采用的不同富度区间内宇宙学样本（\(\lambda^{ob}>20\) ）的质量分布。右上图：\(M=10^{14}h^{-1}\ M_{\odot}\) 系统的 \(\lambda^{ob}\) （橙色）和 \(\lambda^{tr}\) （青色）的概率分布函数。右下图：\(\lambda^{tr}=20\) 和 \(40\) 的 \(P(\lambda^{ob}|\lambda^{tr})\) 分布。实线对应于从方程17导出的模型预测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the model predictions of the density profiles ( solid lines) and the corresponding measurements from mock data ( shaded bands ) for \(\lambda^{ob}=20\) and \(z^{ob}=0.5\) clusters. The band width represents the \(1\sigma\) uncertainty of the measurements. Upper panel: Two-halo component of the projected density profile for different \(\lambda^{tr}\) values. Larger (lower) \(\Delta^{prj}=\lambda^{ob}-\lambda^{tr}\) values correspond to denser (emptier) lines of sight. Middle panel: Comparison of the \(\langle\Sigma^{prj}\rangle\) profile for a richness-selected sample and a random-selected sample with the same mass distribution. title: Accurate polarization calibration of FAST spectral data for measurements of Zeeman splittings of OH megamasers in IRAS 02524+2046
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables, Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: An accurate polarization calibration is essential for a spectral data analysis and Zeeman splitting measurements. Two anomalies challenge our understanding of OH megamasers in IRAS 02524+2046: an unexplained 1667/1665 MHz flux-ratio deviation, and complex Stokes V signatures. Well-calibrated sensitive polarization observations are required to understand them. We develop a polarization calibration solution for the L-band 19-beam receiver installed on the Five-hundred-meter aperture spherical radio telescope (FAST) to achieve a high calibration accuracy and thus enable accurate measurements of the OH megamaser properties in IRAS 02524+2046. We determined the Mueller matrix solution for spectral observations across the 1050-1450 MHz frequency range with an accuracy of about 0.01%-0.08% for circular polarization. We then applied it to FAST observational data of IRAS 02524+2046. Our results show narrower emission line components in the OH megamasers than previously reported, which are indistinguishable in the total power spectrum, but are detected in the circular polarization spectrum. The 1667 MHz OH megamaser emissions probably span a wide velocity range from ~54750 to ~53580 km/s, indicating greater complexity than previously recognized. Our fit of the total power and circular polarization spectra for IRAS 02524+2046 revealed ten line components with significant Zeeman splitting (>3sigma), indicating in situ magnetic fields with a strength of approximately -24.5 mG to +20.6 mG, most of which (8/10) have positive values.

title: Higher resolution optical spectra of $M_*<10^{10}~M_{\odot}$ galaxies reveal outflow signatures unresolved by the SDSS
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A. 21 pages, 16 figures
summary: Galactic outflows are predicted to be ubiquitous in low-mass galaxies, but observational evidence is lacking. Both a low signal-to-noise and a low spectral resolution can severely hamper the detection of galactic outflows, especially in small galaxies that have intrinsically narrow spectral lines. We obtained new, medium-high resolution (FWHM$_\mathrm{inst}\sim50-110$~km/s) optical spectra of 52 local star forming galaxies ($0.01 < z < 0.03$) with stellar masses $10^{8.5}<M_*/[M_{\odot}]<10^{10}$, using the TNG/DOLORES and NTT/EFOSC2 instruments. Our parent sample consists of SDSS galaxies with available heterodyne single-dish molecular (i.e., CO) line data. The targets of this study are selected among those that, based on the comparison between CO line widths, SDSS spectral resolution, and corresponding SDSS-based H$α$ line widths, have a high chance of being unresolved by SDSS spectroscopy. Our new, spectra reveal overall narrower H$α$ and [OIII]$\lambda5007$ lines, with signs of asymmetries and broad wings that are absent in the SDSS spectra of the same galaxies. This confirms that SDSS spectroscopy does not resolve the narrow emission lines of low-M$_*$ galaxies, which hinders the detection of outflows. We identify outflow signatures in $\sim30\%$ of our targets based on the H$α$ line spectra. Assuming a typical bi-conical outflow geometry, this detection rate is consistent with theoretical predictions of ubiquitous outflows in the low-mass regime. The outflow incidence is enhanced ($\sim60\%$) for galaxies with above average star formation rates for the sample (SFR $>10^{-0.74}~\mathrm{M_{\odot}/yr}$). We estimate ionized gas mass outflow rates ranging from $\sim0.1-50\times10^{-3}~\mathrm{M_{\odot}/yr}$ (mean $\sim20\times10^{-3}~\mathrm{M_{\odot}/yr}$) and corresponding mass loading factors between 0.03 and 0.14 (mean $\sim0.07$) for the sample.

AI.tldr: 使用中高分辨率光谱观测低质量星系，发现SDSS光谱无法分辨其窄发射线，从而阻碍了星系外流的探测。在约30%的目标星系中检测到外流信号，与理论预测的低质量星系普遍存在外流的观点一致。
AI.motivation: 星系外流在低质量星系中普遍存在，但观测证据不足。低信噪比和低光谱分辨率严重阻碍了星系外流的探测，特别是在具有本征窄谱线的小星系中。
AI.method: 使用TNG/DOLORES和NTT/EFOSC2仪器，对52个本地恒星形成星系（0.01<z<0.03，恒星质量10^8.5-10^10 M⊙）进行中高分辨率（FWHM_inst~50-110 km/s）光学光谱观测。目标选自SDSS星系中，基于CO线宽、SDSS光谱分辨率与相应Hα线宽比较，有高概率被SDSS光谱未分辨的星系。
AI.result: 新光谱显示总体上更窄的Hα和[OIII]λ5007线，存在不对称性和宽翼特征，这些在相同星系的SDSS光谱中缺失。约30%的目标星系中检测到基于Hα谱线的外流信号。对于高于样本平均恒星形成率（SFR>10^-0.74 M⊙/yr）的星系，外流发生率提高至约60%。估计电离气体质量外流率约为0.1-50×10^-3 M⊙/yr（平均~20×10^-3 M⊙/yr），相应的质量加载因子在0.03-0.14之间（平均~0.07）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系外流在低质量星系中被预测为普遍存在，但观测证据不足。低信噪比和低光谱分辨率会严重阻碍星系外流的探测，尤其是在具有固有窄谱线的小星系中。我们利用TNG/DOLORES和NTT/EFOSC2仪器，获得了52个本地恒星形成星系（$0.01 < z < 0.03$，恒星质量$10^{8.5}<M_*/[M_{\odot}]<10^{10}$）的新中高分辨率（FWHM$_\mathrm{inst}\sim50-110$ km/s）光学光谱。我们的母样本包括具有可用外差单碟分子（即CO）线数据的SDSS星系。本研究的目标是从那些基于CO线宽、SDSS光谱分辨率以及相应的SDSS H$α$线宽比较，有很高概率未被SDSS光谱分辨的星系中选出。我们的新光谱揭示了整体更窄的H$α$和[OIII]$\lambda5007$线，并显示出在相同星系的SDSS光谱中缺失的不对称性和宽翼特征。这证实了SDSS光谱无法分辨低M$_*$星系的窄发射线，从而阻碍了外流的探测。我们根据H$α$线光谱，在约30%的目标中识别出外流特征。假设典型的双锥外流几何结构，该探测率与低质量星系普遍存在外流的理论预测一致。对于样本中恒星形成率高于平均值（SFR $>10^{-0.74}~\mathrm{M_{\odot}/yr}$）的星系，外流发生率有所提高（约60%）。我们估计电离气体质量外流率范围约为$\sim0.1-50\times10^{-3}~\mathrm{M_{\odot}/yr}$（平均值约$\sim20\times10^{-3}~\mathrm{M_{\odot}/yr}$），相应的质量加载因子在0.03到0.14之间（样本平均值约$\sim0.07$）。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：SDSS光谱无法分辨低质量星系的窄发射线，这阻碍了外流的探测。观测到的外流发生率与理论预测的低质量星系普遍存在外流的观点一致。外流发生率在恒星形成率较高的星系中增强，质量加载因子相对较低。

title: Spectroscopic confirmation of dual and offset quasars from the Subaru HSC-SSP program
summary: We present a spectroscopic follow-up program targeting closely-separated dual quasar candidates selected from imaging of SDSS quasars with the Subaru Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program (HSC-SSP). Using two-dimensional image decomposition, our selection identifies PSF-like companions within 0.6-4 arcsec separation (< 30 kpc) around the SDSS quasar. We newly confirm six broad-line dual quasars and eleven offset quasars (quasar-galaxy pairs), spanning 1.5 < z < 3.3 for the duals and predominantly z < 0.6 for the offset systems. No obvious lensed quasars were discovered from this program. We obtained 99 spectra of these candidates from NTT/EFOSC2, Gemini/GMOS-N, Keck/NIRES, and Subaru/FOCAS. From the spectra, we measure the emission-line properties of these dual black holes (BH). At z > 1.5, the confirmed duals exhibit high black hole mass ($M_{\rm BH}$ $=10^{8.5}$-$10^{10} M_{\odot}$) with high bolometric luminosities ($L_{bol}$ $=10^{45.5}$-$10^{47.5}$ erg s$^{-1}$), yet accrete at moderate Eddington ratios ($λ_{\rm Edd}=$0.01-0.4). From the spectroscopically-confirmed samples, we estimate the dual fraction of SDSS quasars with separations of 0.6-4 arcsec to be 0.2%-1.2% at z<0.8, 0.08%-0.24% at 0.8<z<1.5, and 0.06% at 1.5<z<3.3. These values are broadly consistent with other recent optical studies, but lower than theoretical expectations of a rising dual fraction at cosmic noon. However, we note that these fractions, especially at high $z$, still need a more accurate assessment of selection and observation effects.

AI.tldr: 通过光谱观测确认了6个宽线双类星体和11个偏移类星体对，测量了双黑洞系统的性质，并估计了不同红移下的双类星体比例，发现低于理论预期。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一项光谱后续观测计划，该计划针对从斯巴鲁超广角主焦点相机战略计划（HSC-SSP）对SDSS类星体的成像中选出的、间距紧密的双类星体候选体。利用二维图像分解，我们的选择方法在SDSS类星体周围0.6-4角秒（< 30 kpc）的间距内识别出类点源伴体。我们新确认了六个宽发射线双类星体和十一个偏移类星体（类星体-星系对），其中双类星体的红移范围为1.5 < z < 3.3，偏移系统主要位于z < 0.6。本计划未发现明显的引力透镜类星体。我们利用NTT/EFOSC2、Gemini/GMOS-N、Keck/NIRES和Subaru/FOCAS获得了这些候选体的99条光谱。根据这些光谱，我们测量了这些双黑洞（BH）的发射线性质。在z > 1.5处，已确认的双类星体表现出高黑洞质量（$M_{\rm BH}$ $=10^{8.5}$-$10^{10} M_{\odot}$）和高热光度（$L_{bol}$ $=10^{45.5}$-$10^{47.5}$ erg s$^{-1}$），但以中等爱丁顿比率（$λ_{\rm Edd}=$0.01-0.4）吸积。根据光谱确认的样本，我们估计在0.6-4角秒间距下，SDSS类星体的双类星体比例在z<0.8时为0.2%-1.2%，在0.8<z<1.5时为0.08%-0.24%，在1.5<z<3.3时为0.06%。这些值与其他近期光学研究大致一致，但低于在宇宙正午时期双类星体比例上升的理论预期。然而，我们注意到这些比例，尤其是在高红移处，仍需更准确地评估选择和观测效应的影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：观测到的双类星体比例低于理论预期，特别是在宇宙正午时期（高红移）没有显示出预期的上升趋势。但需要更准确地评估选择和观测效应的影响。

title: WALLABY pilot survey: HI depletion times within the stellar discs of nearby galaxies
comment: 11 main pages (9 figures), 5 appendix pages (3 figures, 4 tables), accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: Neutral atomic hydrogen (HI) reservoirs typically extend far beyond the inner star-forming regions of galaxies, and global HI measurements, which mix these distinct environments, limit our understanding of the gas-star formation cycle. In particular, global HI depletion times combine gas and star formation from different physical scales, contributing to long measured timescales (5-9 Gyr) and large scatter compared to molecular gas. Using 841 gas-rich galaxies from the Widefield ASKAP L-band Legacy All-sky Blind Survey (WALLABY) pilot observations, we investigate how HI depletion time and its scaling relations change when HI and star formation are both confined to the stellar disc (R25, the isophotal radius at 25 mag arcsec-2 in i-band). We find that depletion times within this region are on average 1.4 Gyr shorter than global values, though some remain very long, indicating that a substantial fraction of HI remains inactive for star formation. HI depletion times anti-correlate strongly with stellar surface density, and this trend becomes even tighter within the stellar disc. The Kennicutt-Schmidt relation further reveals an almost constant HI depletion time at fixed stellar surface density, similar to the behaviour seen for molecular gas, suggesting that HI and star formation are regulated by conditions that enable HI-to-H2 conversion, traced by stellar surface density. Beyond the stellar disc, HI depletion times are on average almost 10 Gyr longer than within R25, confirming extremely inefficient star formation in low-density outer regions. These results highlight the critical role of spatial location and local conditions for HI to serve as a fuel for star formation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现中性氢(HI)在星系不同区域的恒星形成效率差异显著，通过限制在恒星盘内(R25)分析，HI耗尽时间比全球平均值缩短1.4 Gyr，但仍有大量HI保持非活跃状态。
AI.motivation: 全球HI测量将星系不同物理尺度的气体和恒星形成混合在一起，限制了我们对气体-恒星形成循环的理解。特别是全球HI耗尽时间结合了不同尺度的气体和恒星形成，导致测量时间尺度长(5-9 Gyr)且与分子气体相比存在较大散射。
AI.method: 使用WALLABY巡天试点观测的841个富气体星系，研究当HI和恒星形成都限制在恒星盘(R25)内时，HI耗尽时间及其比例关系如何变化。通过比较恒星盘内外的HI耗尽时间，分析恒星表面密度与HI耗尽时间的关系。
AI.result: 恒星盘内的HI耗尽时间平均比全球值短1.4 Gyr，但仍有部分保持很长，表明大量HI保持非活跃状态。HI耗尽时间与恒星表面密度呈强反相关，且在恒星盘内这一趋势更紧密。Kennicutt-Schmidt关系显示在固定恒星表面密度下，HI耗尽时间几乎恒定，类似于分子气体的行为。恒星盘外的HI耗尽时间平均比R25内长近10 Gyr。
AI.conclusion: 空间位置和局部条件对HI作为恒星形成燃料起着关键作用。HI和恒星形成受能够实现HI到H2转化的条件调控，这些条件由恒星表面密度追踪。低密度外围区域的恒星形成效率极低。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 中性原子氢（HI）储库通常远远延伸到星系内部恒星形成区域之外，而全球HI测量混合了这些不同的环境，限制了我们对气体-恒星形成循环的理解。特别是，全球HI耗尽时间结合了来自不同物理尺度的气体和恒星形成，导致测量的时间尺度较长（5-9 Gyr）且与分子气体相比存在较大离散。利用来自宽视场ASKAP L波段遗产全天盲巡天（WALLABY）试点观测的841个富气体星系，我们研究了当HI和恒星形成都局限于恒星盘（R25，即i波段25 mag arcsec⁻²处的等光度半径）时，HI耗尽时间及其标度关系如何变化。我们发现，该区域内的耗尽时间平均比全球值短1.4 Gyr，尽管有些仍然很长，表明相当一部分HI仍处于非活跃状态，未参与恒星形成。HI耗尽时间与恒星表面密度呈强反相关，且在恒星盘内这种趋势变得更加紧密。Kennicutt-Schmidt关系进一步揭示了在固定恒星表面密度下，HI耗尽时间几乎恒定，类似于分子气体的行为，表明HI和恒星形成受能够实现HI到H₂转化的条件调控，这些条件由恒星表面密度追踪。在恒星盘之外，HI耗尽时间平均比R25内长约10 Gyr，证实了低密度外围区域的恒星形成效率极低。这些结果突显了空间位置和局部条件对于HI作为恒星形成燃料的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：空间位置和局部条件对HI作为恒星形成燃料起着关键作用。HI和恒星形成受能够实现HI到H₂转化的条件调控，这些条件由恒星表面密度追踪。低密度外围区域的恒星形成效率极低。
